channel.title: Freelancing on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Freelancing on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Organize Freelance Projects Without Losing Your Mind
item.description: How to Organize Freelance Projects Without Losing Your Mind If you’re a freelancer, you’ve probably felt the chaos of juggling multiple clients, deadlines, and deliverables—sometimes all at once. One missed email or forgotten task can spiral into a late project, an unhappy client, or worse, no payment. The problem isn’t that you’re bad at your work; it’s that you don’t have a system to keep everything in check. Let’s fix that.

item.title: How to Price Your Freelance Services Without Losing Clients
item.description: How to Price Your Freelance Services Without Losing Clients If you’re a freelancer, you’ve probably stared at a blank invoice wondering what to charge. Too high, and you scare clients away. Too low, and you’re working for peanuts—barely covering your bills. Pricing your services is one of the trickiest parts of freelancing, especially when you’re starting out or pivoting to a new niche. The fear of rejection or being seen as “too expensive” can trap you into undercharging, which kills your income and confidence.
